title: Text, Unicode, Formatting, and Parsing
description: Normalize multilingual community-event records and generate readable confirmations. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of a multilingual event text normalizer while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Manipulate strings while preserving Unicode meaning and boundaries.
Format user-facing text without mixing presentation and data logic.
Parse structured text with deliberate methods and regular expressions only when justified.
